steps.title: Use the graphical solution
steps.content: The solution to a system of two equations is the point where the two graphs intersect.

steps.title: Read the intersection point
steps.content: On the graph, the line and the absolute value function intersect at $(1,5)$. The point $(4,2)$ is the vertex of the absolute value graph, not the intersection.

steps.title: Select the matching point
steps.content: The solution to the system is $(1,5)$. The answer is C.
